title: Mouthwatering Irish Sweet Potato Skewers
description: Sweet, crispy sweet potato skewers roasted in a tandoor-inspired grill, flavored with bay leaves and Mediterranean herbs.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Peel the sweet potatoes and cut them into 1-inch cubes.
In a bowl, toss the sweet potato cubes with olive oil, smoked paprika, sea salt, pepper, bay leaves, and lemon zest.
Spread the seasoned sweet potatoes in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast for 20 minutes, turning halfway through, until the cubes are tender and caramelized.
Stir in honey during the last 5 minutes of roasting to create a glaze.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle crumbled feta cheese over the hot sweet potatoes.
Serve the skewers warm as a side dish or light main course.
